summary: Forensic analysis of 21 Python scripts, 10 Jupyter notebooks, and multiple Frankenstein blend attempts by previous agents on the Heart Disease S6E2 competition. Documents chronological timeline (Phases 1-7), identifies 12 specific errors categorized as Critical (deduplication missing, DART timeout, stacking underperformance, no ExtraTrees), Operational (200 model fits timeout, GPU quota exhaustion, notebook fragmentation), and Design (43 redundant features, blind blending, column mismatches, no log transformation). Shows how KillShot v3.2 addresses all critical errors.
